operations.summary: Get document full text with anchors
operations.description: Returns the full text content of a document with embedded anchors. Anchors are in format [id: #elementId] for units and [?part=elementId] for content items. Use together with /toc to extract specific sections by line numbers. Use optional 'part' query parameter to return only specific text parts. Supports IDs like CR17044 and time versions like CR17044_2026_01_01.

parameters.name: part
parameters.description: Optional part identifier filter. Returns text only for selected parts. Use repeated query params (?part=paragraf140&part=paragraf141).

operations.summary: Get Czech law full text with anchors (by law number and year)
operations.description: Resolves Czech legislation by law number/year (e.g. 262/2006 Sb.) to the current/nearest valid time version and returns its text. Same output format as GET /doc/{docId}/text. Use optional repeated 'part' query parameter to return only specific parts (e.g. ?part=paragraf1).

parameters.name: part
parameters.description: Optional part identifier filter. Returns text only for selected parts. Use repeated query params (?part=paragraf140&part=paragraf141).
